hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ]; then if grep -qE '(API_KEY|SECRET|PASSWORD|TOKEN|PRIVATE_KEY)\s*=\s*.[^"]+.' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCK: Hardcoded secret detected in file. Use environment variables instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.kt ]] || [[ "$file" == *.java ]]; then echo '[Advisory] Remember to run build after changes: ./gradlew build'; fi
cmd="$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND"; if [[ "$cmd" == *gradlew* ]]; then echo '[Advisory] Consider using background mode (run_in_background) for long-running commands'; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.kt ]]; then echo '[Advisory] Run ./gradlew spotlessApply to format Kotlin code'; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ]; then if [[ "$file" == *.kt ]] || [[ "$file" == *.java ]]; then if grep -qE 'println|System\.out' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[Advisory] Found println/System.out statements. Use proper logging (SLF4J/Logback)'; fi; fi; fi
echo '[Advisory] Session ending. Remember to check for debug statements (println, System.out) before committing.'
